channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Google Launches Android Intrusion Logging to Stop Sophisticated Spyware
item.description:
Google rolls out Intrusion Logging for Android, a forensic opt-in feature built with Amnesty International to detect and expose sophisticated spyware attacks targeting journalists and activists.

Key points:
• Intrusion Logging is part of Android's Advanced Protection Mode and currently limited to Pixel devices running Android 16 or newer
• Logs are end-to-end encrypted, stored in the user's Google account for 12 months, and cannot be accessed by Google or any third party
• The feature records device and network activity including app installs/removals, website connections, device unlocks, and ADB connections to aid forensic investigations
• Amnesty International called it the first purpose-built system from a major device vendor for forensic detection of advanced mobile attacks, developed alongside Reporters Without Borders

Read the full article: Google Launches Android Intrusion Logging to Stop Sophisticated Spyware

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
